title: mRNA Extraction and cDNA Preparation
author: Shiyi Wang
materials: **Thaw and Resuspend Cells** - Thaw cells stored in TRIzol (15596026, Invitrogen). - Resuspend cells in 1 mL of TRIzol.
**Precipitate RNA** - Add GlycoBlue Coprecipitant (AM9515, Invitrogen) and isopropanol to precipitate the RNA.
**Quantify RNA** - Quantify the RNA using the Qubit RNA HS Assay Kit (Q32852, Invitrogen).

steps.title: **Add Chloroform** - Add 200 μL...
steps.instruction: **Add Chloroform** - Add 200 μL of chloroform to the samples.

steps.title: **Centrifuge Samples** - Centrifuge the samples...
steps.instruction: **Centrifuge Samples** - Centrifuge the samples at 12,000 g for 15 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: **Collect Aqueous Phase** - Carefully collect the aqueous phase
steps.instruction: **Collect Aqueous Phase** - Carefully collect the aqueous phase.

steps.title: **Wash RNA Pellet** - Wash the...
steps.instruction: **Wash RNA Pellet** - Wash the RNA pellet with 75% ethanol.

steps.title: **Dry and Resuspend RNA** - Air-dry the RNA pellet
steps.instruction: **Dry and Resuspend RNA** - Air-dry the RNA pellet. - Resuspend the RNA in 40 μL of nuclease-free water.

steps.title: **Isolate RNA** - Isolate the RNA...
steps.instruction: **Isolate RNA** - Isolate the RNA using the Zymo Research RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 Kit (R1014, Zymo).

steps.title: **Equalize RNA Concentrations** - Dilute the RNA to equalize concentrations
steps.instruction: **Equalize RNA Concentrations** - Dilute the RNA to equalize concentrations.

steps.title: **Generate cDNA Libraries** - Use the...
steps.instruction: **Generate cDNA Libraries** - Use the qScript cDNA SuperMix (101414-102, VWR) for cDNA library preparation. - Follow this temperature profile: - 25°C for 5 minutes - 42°C for 30 minutes - 85°C for 5 minutes

steps.title: **Dilute and Store cDNA** - Dilute the resulting cDNA threefold
steps.instruction: **Dilute and Store cDNA** - Dilute the resulting cDNA threefold. - Store the cDNA at −80°C.
